changeSet.author: openelis-bacteriology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 4

changeSet.comment: Create Processing and Quality Control page for Bacteriology Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Prepare culture and biochemical media with IQC verification. Test antibiotic discs with ATCC control strains. Process samples through Gram staining, microscopy examination, inoculation onto appropriate media, and incubation. Record QC results and document any failures with retake options.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 4

changeSet.author: openelis-bacteriology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE workflow_category = 'BACTERIOLOGY' AND name = 'Processing & Quality Control'

changeSet.comment: Insert Processing and Quality Control page template for Bacteriology workflow

column.name: description
column.value: Prepare culture and biochemical media with IQC, test antibiotic discs, and process samples through Gram staining, microscopy, inoculation, and incubation

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Section A - Preparation: Record culture media preparation (Blood Agar, MacConkey, etc.) with batch numbers, dates, and IQC results. Record biochemical media preparation (TSI, Urease, Citrate, etc.) with sterility and reactivity tests. Test antibiotic discs with ATCC control strains and verify zone diameters. Track media/reagent inventory with expiry alerts. Section B - Processing: Perform Gram staining on direct smear, microscopy examination for preliminary ID, inoculation onto appropriate media, and incubation (18-48 hours). Record QC results - Pass continues to identification, Fail allows retake.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Processing and Quality Control - Media Preparation and Sample Processing

changeSet.author: openelis-bacteriology
changeSet.comment: Create table for culture media preparation records

changeSet.author: openelis-bacteriology
changeSet.comment: Create table for biochemical media preparation records

changeSet.author: openelis-bacteriology
changeSet.comment: Create table for antibiotic disc IQC records
